lines.english: He is the Architect of Destiny; He blesses us with mind and body.
God is the Life of the world; there is no other at all.
That Architect of Destiny is in my mind and mouth.
One who lovingly chants the Name of the Sovereign Lord King,
fights the battle and conquers his own mind;
day and night, he remains imbued with the Lord's Love.
O Nanak, imbued with the Naam, the Name of the Lord, one is honored. ||9||
He is famous throughout the three worlds and the four ages.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਜਾਤਾ ਸੋ ਤਿਸ ਹੀ ਜੇਹਾ ॥
lines.translit: jin jaataa so tis hee jehaa |
lines.english: One who knows the Lord, becomes like Him.
He becomes absolutely immaculate, and his body is sanctified.
He lovingly centers his attention deep within upon the True Word of the Shabad. ||10||
His heart is happy, in love with the One Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੋਸੁ ਨ ਕੀਜੈ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਪੀਜੈ ਰਹਣੁ ਨਹੀ ਸੰਸਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: ros na keejai amrit peejai rehan nahee sansaare |
lines.english: Don't be angry - drink in the Ambrosial Nectar; you shall not remain in this world forever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਹਣ ਕਹਣ ਤੇ ਰਹੈ ਨ ਕੋਈ ਕਿਸੁ ਪਹਿ ਕਰਉ ਬਿਨੰਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: rehan kehan te rahai na koee kis peh krau binantee |
lines.english: Everyone says that they will remain, but none of them remain; unto whom should I offer my prayer?

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਜੇ ਰਾਇ ਰੰਕ ਨਹੀ ਰਹਣਾ ਆਇ ਜਾਇ ਜੁਗ ਚਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: raaje raae rank nahee rahanaa aae jaae jug chaare |
lines.english: The ruling kings and the paupers shall not remain; they come and go, throughout the four ages.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੁ ਸਬਦੁ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਨਿਰੋਧਰੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਦੇਵੈ ਪਤਿ ਮਤੀ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: ek sabad raam naam nirodhar gur devai pat matee |11|
lines.english: The One Shabad, the Name of the Lord, will never fail you; the Guru grants honor and understanding. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਜ ਮਰੰਤੀ ਮਰਿ ਗਈ ਘੂਘਟੁ ਖੋਲਿ ਚਲੀ ॥
lines.translit: laaj marantee mar gee ghooghatt khol chalee |
lines.english: My shyness and hesitation have died and gone, and I walk with my face unveiled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰੇਮਿ ਬੁਲਾਈ ਰਲੀ ਸਿਉ ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਅਨੰਦੁ ॥
lines.translit: prem bulaaee ralee siau man meh sabad anand |
lines.english: My Beloved has summoned me with joyful caresses; my mind is filled with the bliss of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਸੁ ਦਿਵਾਨੀ ਬਾਵਰੀ ਸਿਰ ਤੇ ਸੰਕ ਟਲੀ ॥
lines.translit: saas divaanee baavaree sir te sank ttalee |
lines.english: The confusion and doubt from my crazy, insane mother-in-law has been removed from over my head.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਲਿ ਰਤੀ ਲਾਲੀ ਭਈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਭਈ ਨਿਚਿੰਦੁ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: laal ratee laalee bhee guramukh bhee nichind |12|
lines.english: Imbued with the Love of my Beloved, I have become Gurmukh, and carefree. ||12||
Chant the jewel of the Naam, and earn the profit of the Lord.
For the sake of earning the profit of the Lord, the mortal comes into the world.
slander, inuendo and gossip;
the self-willed manmukh is blind, foolish and ignorant.
Greed, avarice, evil and egotism;
O Nanak, is truly honored by the True Supreme King. ||13||
One who earns the profit of the Naam, with the capital of faith,
But he becomes a mere slave laborer, and is mugged by the mugger, Maya.
The world is ruined on the path of Death.
If wealth visits the home of the lowliest clown,
No one has the power to erase Maya's influence.
seeing that wealth, all pay their respects to him.
Without devotional worship, the world is insane.
Even an idiot is thought of as clever, if he is rich.
The One Lord is contained among all.
Throughout the ages, the Lord is eternally established; He has no vengeance.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰੇ ਤਿਸੁ ਪਰਗਟੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: jis no kirapaa kare tis paragatt hoe |14|
lines.english: He reveals Himself, unto those whom He blesses with His Grace. ||14||
He is not subject to birth and death; He is not entangled in worldly affairs.
Whatever is seen, is the Lord Himself.
Creating Himself, He establishes Himself in the heart.
He is the Way of Yoga, the Life of the World.
Without the Naam, the Name of the Lord, how can anyone find liberation? ||15||
Living a righteous lifestyle, true peace is found.
He Himself is unfathomable; He links people to their affairs.
The traveller comes and goes along the highway.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਉ ਨ ਮਿਲਹਿ ਕਾਟਹਿ ਮਨ ਪੀਰ ॥
lines.translit: kiau na mileh kaatteh man peer |
lines.english: Why not meet the Lord, and take away the pain of your mind?
Without the Name, even one's own body is an enemy.
Without the Name, one loses everywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਆ ਲੇ ਆਇਆ ਕਿਆ ਪਲੈ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: kiaa le aaeaa kiaa palai paae |
lines.english: What did he bring when he came, and what will he take away when he goes?
The profit is earned, when the Lord grants understanding.
One who contemplates the Lord's Virtues is spiritually wise.
Without the Name, how can one find honor and nobility? ||16||
In merchandise and trade, the merchant is trading.
The True way of life comes through contemplation of the Guru.
The Lord is inaccessible and unfathomable. His worth cannot be estimated.
How rare in this world, is the Giver of virtue.
Through His Virtues, one receives spiritual wisdom.
